name: Spice Delight Cake with Seafoam Icing
recipeInstructions:
1. For the cake: Cream butter (or margarine) and gradually add sugar. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition. Add vanilla extract. Sift dry ingredients together; alternately add to the batter with milk.
2. Divide the batter into two bowls. In one bowl, mix in the spices. Grease and flour two 8-inch cake pans. Pour the plain batter into one pan and the spiced batter into the other. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool completely before frosting.
3. Seafoam Icing: Combine all icing ingredients except vanilla extract in the top of a double boiler set over boiling water. Beat with an electric mixer on low speed until blended, then increase to high and beat until the mixture forms stiff peaks. Remove from heat and add vanilla; continue beating until the icing reaches a spreading consistency.
